evals.rule: If behavior differs from known working flow or no-touch area, STATUS: FAILED with DRIFT_DETECTED. If suspected but not proven, STATUS: MANUAL_REVIEW with POSSIBLE_DRIFT. Without a baseline: UNKNOWN_BASELINE — do not pretend the check ran.
examples: WOW/game behavior changed while working on AbuAI
helper function exists but is not reachable from actual user flow
